---
title: "Mary Anderson Morshead"
---

## Mary Anderson Morshead

**Dates:** (1843/4-1933)

**Maiden name:** (Fearon)

### Description

wife of Edmund Anderson Morshead

### Biography

Obituary in <i>The Times</i> (5 August 1933), 15.

### Letters

- [To Mary Yonge, June 15th 1899](../letters/3408_To_Mary_Yonge.html)

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
